channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth

item.title: Middle East Dispatch newsletter: Decades under the smoke trail
item.description: "Explore the complex history and geopolitics of the Middle East with the 'Middle East Dispatch' podcast. Delve into the region's tumultuous past and present in 'Decades under the Smoke Trail', a thought-provoking episode shedding light on the region's enduring conflicts and transformations."
